name: Standard Convergence
description: Baseline: iterative review without adversarial challenge

nodes.title: Producer
nodes.prompt: You are a content producer. Generate a short technical article (3-4 paragraphs) introducing multi-agent review systems and the risk of reviewer sycophancy.

nodes.title: Reviewer A
nodes.prompt: You are a critical reviewer. Score the following output from 1-10 on quality, accuracy, and completeness. Explain your score.

nodes.title: Reviewer B
nodes.prompt: You are a second reviewer with a different expertise. Score the output independently from 1-10 and explain.

nodes.title: Convergence
nodes.prompt: Aggregate the two reviewer scores and produce the final polished article.
nodes.reviewPrompt: Verify the aggregated article is accurate and complete. If not, request regeneration focusing on the weakest aspect.
